text: The glowing blue light behind the glass tempts me, hinting at purpose and innovation hidden within this space. Stepping closer, I find myself amid a display about research and human connection. The words on the wall speak of darkness, uncertainty, and contemplation. I am surrounded by the hum of technology and imagination, and I'm invited to reflect on how humans shape, and are shaped by, the unknown. I feel strangely comforted—drawn into thoughtful solitude, yet aware of a larger, interconnected narrative unfolding around me.
